title: TaxonomyGapProposal
description: An investment theme detected via market signals that does not map to any existing sector in sector_taxonomy.yaml. Output of the Discovery Pass. Accumulates evidence across monthly reviews. Promotion to sector_taxonomy.yaml is always a user decision — the system only records evidence.

id.description: Format: gap_YYYYMMDD_slug. Date = first detection date. Never changes after creation.

status.description: proposed: first detection this cycle. accumulating: seen in more than one scan. promoted: user decided to add to sector_taxonomy.yaml. rejected: user decided not to track.

first_detected.description: Date the gap was first identified by the Discovery Pass. Never changes.

last_seen.description: Date of the most recent Discovery Pass cycle that confirmed this theme. Updated each scan cycle.

signal_count.description: Number of Discovery Pass cycles in which this theme was independently detected. Informational only — promotion is not triggered automatically by this value. Must equal evidence array length.

label_inferred.description: LLM-inferred sector label. Format mirrors sector_taxonomy.yaml labels. Can be revised as evidence accumulates.

parent_sector_inferred.description: Inferred parent group (e.g. technology, precious_metals, defense).

demand_drivers_inferred.description: Inferred demand drivers. Refined as evidence accumulates.

differentiation_inferred.description: Why this is NOT the same as adjacent sectors already in the taxonomy. This is the most important field — a gap is only valid if it is genuinely differentiated.

closest_existing_sectors.description: Sectors in the taxonomy with the highest semantic similarity to this theme. Explains why it was flagged as a gap rather than matched.

why_insufficient.description: Why the existing sector does NOT fully capture this theme.

pure_play_found.description: True if a dedicated ETF with >50% exposure to this theme was found.

pure_play_ticker.description: Ticker of pure-play ETF if found. null if not found.

proxies.description: Existing ETFs with partial exposure. Do NOT make the sector investable on their own — informational only.

investability_assessment.description: not_yet: no ETF vehicle. proxy_only: only via a broader ETF at low weight. investable_pending_etf_verify: ETF found but not yet confirmed UCITS/accessible. investable: full ETF coverage confirmed.

evidence.description: One entry per Discovery Pass cycle that detected this theme. signal_count must equal this array's length. Dates are stored explicitly so this file is self-contained and interpretable without context from other sessions.

date.description: Exact date of the Discovery Pass cycle that produced this entry. Always stored as YYYY-MM-DD — never relative ('last week', 'this month').

source_query.description: The WebSearch query that surfaced this signal.

proposed_sector_id.description: Candidate sector_id for sector_taxonomy.yaml. Set by user when they decide to promote.

promoted_date.description: Date the user confirmed promotion to sector_taxonomy.yaml. null until promoted.

rejection_reason.description: Required if status = rejected. Set by user.
